messages.content: how to view the arc-coverage report from index.html

To view the arc-coverage report from index.html, you will need to first generate the coverage report using a code coverage tool such as Istanbul or nyc. Once you have generated the coverage report, you can typically find an index.html file that contains the coverage report in a folder within your project directory.

To view the arc-coverage report from index.html, you can open the index.html file in a web browser. Simply navigate to the folder where the index.html file is located, right-click on the file, and select "Open with" from the dropdown menu. Choose a web browser like Google Chrome or Firefox to open the file.

Once the index.html file opens in the web browser, you should see the coverage report displayed with details on the percentage of code covered, individual files and functions, and any uncovered lines of code. You can navigate through the report to analyze the coverage of your codebase and identify areas that may need improvement.
